## 2026-04-04T20:11:58+00:00Z - v3_df

```json
{
  "id": "chatcmpl-b95563d7cba2634a",
  "model": "Qwen/Qwen3.5-27B-FP8",
  "choices": [
    {
      "index": 0,
      "message": {
        "role": "assistant",
        "content": "{\n  \"overview_md\": \"# Consumption Report Contract\\n\\n## Executive Summary\\nThis report generates a consumption analysis for feed batches, comparing setpoint weights against actual weights across 12 bins per recipe. The data is unpivoted from a wide format (12 bin columns) to a long format (rows per material) to calculate row-level errors and percentage deviations. Totals are aggregated per batch.\\n\\n## Token Inventory\\n- **Scalars**: Plant details, date range, recipe code, and batch identifiers.\\n- **Row Tokens**: Sequential index, material name, set weight, actual weight, error (kg), and error (%).\\n- **Totals**: Sum of set/actual weights, sum of errors, and overall error percentage.\\n\\n## Mapping Table\\n| Token | Source | Logic |\\n|---|---|---|\\n| `plant_name` | `params.plant_name` | Parameter |\\n| `location` | `params.location` | Parameter |\\n| `print_date` | `params.print_date` | Parameter |\\n| `from_date` | `recipes.start_time` | Filter/Date |\\n| `to_date` | `recipes.end_time` | Filter/Date |\\n| `recipe_code` | `params.recipe_code` | Parameter |\\n| `batch_recipe` | `recipes.recipe_name` | Direct |\\n| `batch_no` | `recipes.id` | Direct |\\n| `batch_start` | `recipes.start_time` | Direct (Formatted) |\\n| `batch_end` | `recipes.end_time` | Direct (Formatted) |\\n| `row_sl_no` | `COMPUTED` | Row Number |\\n| `row_material_name` | `RESHAPE` | Unpivot `bin*_content` |\\n| `row_set_wt_kg` | `RESHAPE` | Unpivot `bin*_sp` |\\n| `row_ach_wt_kg` | `RESHAPE` | Unpivot `bin*_act` |\\n| `row_error_kg` | `COMPUTED` | `actual - set` |\\n| `row_error_pct` | `COMPUTED` | `(error / set) * 100` |\\n| `total_*` | `AGGREGATE` | Sum of row columns |\\n\\n## Join & Date Rules\\n- **Join**: Self-join on `recipes` table (parent and child are the same). Key: `recipes.id`.\\n- **Date Columns**: `recipes.start_time` and `recipes.end_time` drive the date filters.\\n- **Filters**: `date_from` and `date_to` map to `recipes.start_time` and `recipes.end_time` respectively.\\n\\n## Transformations\\n1. **Unpivot (MELT)**: Convert 12 `bin*_content`, `bin*_sp`, and `bin*_act` columns into three vertical columns (`row_material_name`, `row_set_wt_kg`, `row_ach_wt_kg`).\\n2. **Row Computed**: Calculate `row_error_kg` (subtract) and `row_error_pct` (divide/multiply).\\n3. **Formatting**: Format timestamps to `dd-mm-yyyy HH:MM:SS`. Format numbers to 2 decimals.\\n4. **Totals**: Sum the computed row columns to generate batch totals.\\n\\n## Parameters\\n- **Required**: `plant_name`, `location`, `print_date`, `recipe_code`, `date_from`, `date_to`.\\n- **Optional**: None.\",\n  \"step5_requirements\": {\n    \"datasets\": {\n      \"header\": {\n        \"description\": \"Report metadata and batch context.\",\n        \"columns\": [\n          \"plant_name\",\n          \"location\",\n          \"print_date\",\n          \"from_date\",\n          \"to_date\",\n          \"recipe_code\",\n          \"batch_recipe\",\n          \"batch_no\",\n          \"batch_start\",\n          \"batch_end\"\n        ]\n      },\n      \"rows\": {\n        \"description\": \"Unpivoted material consumption details per bin.\",\n        \"columns\": [\n          \"row_sl_no\",\n          \"row_material_name\",\n          \"row_set_wt_kg\",\n          \"row_ach_wt_kg\",\n          \"row_error_kg\",\n          \"row_error_pct\"\n        ],\n        \"grouping\": [\n          \"batch_no\"\n        ],\n        \"ordering\": [\n          \"row_sl_no ASC\"\n        ]\n      },\n      \"totals\": {\n        \"description\": \"Aggregated consumption metrics for the batch.\",\n        \"columns\": [\n          \"total_set_wt_kg\",\n          \"total_ach_wt_kg\",\n          \"total_error_kg\",\n          \"total_error_pct\"\n        ]\n      }\n    },\n    \"semantics\": \"Parameters `plant_name`, `location`, `print_date`, and `recipe_code` are passed through directly. Date filters `date_from` and `date_to` constrain the `recipes` table. font-weight: bold;\n            display: inline-block;\n            width: 120px;\n        }\n\n        .header-right .header-label {\n            width: auto;\n            margin-right: 10px;\n        }\n\n        .report-title {\n            text-align: center;\n            font-size: 28pt;\n            font-weight: bold;\n            margin: 15mm 0 5mm 0;\n            font-family: \"Times New Roman\", serif;\n        }\n\n        .recipe-code {\n            position: absolute;\n            bottom: 10mm;\n            right: 15mm;\n            font-weight: bold;\n        }\n\n        /* Table Section */\n        #data-table {\n            width: 100%;\n            border-collapse: collapse;\n            table-layout: fixed;\n            font-size: 12pt;\n        }\n\n        #data-table th, #data-table td {\n            border: 1px solid var(--border-color);\n            padding: 3px 6px;\n            vertical-align: middle;\n        }\n\n        #data-table th {\n            font-weight: bold;\n            background-color: #fff;\n            text-align: center;\n            padding: 6px 6px;\n        }\n\n        /* Column Widths - Adjusted for visual balance */\n        .col-sl { width: 8%; text-align: center; }\n        .col-name { width: 35%; text-align: left; }\n        .col-set { width: 14%; text-align: right; }\n        .col-ach { width: 14%; text-align: right; }\n        .col-err { width: 14%; text-align: right; }\n        .col-err-pct { width: 15%; text-align: right; }\n\n        /* Footer/Totals */\n        #report-totals {\n            margin-top: 0;\n        }\n\n        .total-row td {\n            font-weight: bold;\n        }\n\n        .total-label {\n            text-align: left;\n        }\n    </style>\n</head>\n<body>\n\n    <div id=\"report-header\">\n        <div class=\"header-top-row\">\n            <div class=\"header-left\">\n                <div><span class=\"header-label\">Plant name</span> : </div>\n                <div><span class=\"header-label\">Location</span> : </div>\n                <div><span class=\"header-label\">Print Date</span> : 12/11/2025</div>\n            </div>\n            <div class=\"header-right\">\n                <div><span class=\"header-label\">From</span> Date: 01/10/2025 00:00</div>\n                <div><span class=\"header-label\">To</span> 02/10/2025 00:00</div>\n            </div>\n        </div>\n        <div class=\"report-title\">Consumption report</div>\n        <div class=\"recipe-code\">Recipe code : </div>\n    </div>\n\n    <table id=\"data-table\">\n        <thead>\n            <tr>\n                <th class=\"col-sl\" data-label=\"sl_no\">Sl. No.</th>\n                <th class=\"col-name\" data-label=\"material_name\">Material name</th>\n                <th class=\"col-set\" data-label=\"set_wt_kg\">Set. wt(Kg)</th>\n                <th class=\"col-ach\" data-label=\"ach_wt_kg\">Ach. wt(Kg)</th>\n                <th class=\"col-err\" data-label=\"error_kg\">Error(Kg)</th>\n                <th class=\"col-err-pct\" data-label=\"error_pct\">Error %</th>\n            </tr>\n        </thead>\n        <tbody>\n            <tr>\n                <td class=\"col-sl\">1</td>\n                <td class=\"col-name\">{row_material_name}</td>\n                <td class=\"col-set\">{row_set_wt_kg}</td>\n                <td class=\"col-ach\">{row_ach_wt_kg}</td>\n                <td class=\"col-err\">{row_error_kg}</td>\n                <td class=\"col-err-pct\">{row_error_pct}</td>\n            </tr>\n        </tbody>\n        <tfoot>\n            <tr class=\"total-row\">\n                <td class=\"total-label\" colspan=\"2\">Total</td>\n                <td class=\"col-set\">{total_set_wt_kg}</td>\n                <td class=\"col-ach\">{total_ach_wt_kg}</td>\n                <td class=\"col-err\">{total_error_kg}</td>\n                <td class=\"col-err-pct\">{total_error_pct}</td>\n            </tr>\n        </tfoot>\n    </table>\n\n</body>\n</html>\n<!--END_HTML-->"

The data source is a wide-format recipe table containing 12 potential bins, but this specific report view focuses on the first bin (`bin1`).\\n\\n## Token Inventory\\n- **Scalars**: `print_date`, `from_date`, `to_date` (Report metadata).\\n- **Row Tokens**: \\n  - `row_sl_no`: Sequential batch number.\\n  - `row_material_name`: Name of the material in Bin 1.\\n  - `row_set_wt_kg`: Target weight for Bin 1.\\n  - `row_ach_wt_kg`: Actual weight recorded for Bin 1.\\n  - `row_error_kg`: Computed difference (Actual - Set).\\n  - `row_error_pct`: Computed percentage error.\\n- **Totals**: Currently empty (no aggregate totals defined in schema).\\n\\n## Mapping Table\\n| Token | Source Column | Type | Notes |\\n|-------|---------------|------|-------|\\n| `row_sl_no` | `recipes.rowid` | Direct | Used as sequence identifier. |\\n| `row_material_name` | `recipes.bin1_content` | Direct | Material name for Bin 1. |\\n| `row_set_wt_kg` | `recipes.bin1_sp` | Direct | Set Point (Target) weight. |\\n| `row_ach_wt_kg` | `recipes.bin1_act` | Direct | Actual weight. |\\n| `row_error_kg` | Computed | Derived | `row_ach_wt_kg` - `row_set_wt_kg`. |\\n| `row_error_pct` | Computed | Derived | (`row_error_kg` / `row_set_wt_kg`) * 100. |\\n\\n## Join & Date Rules\\n- **Join Strategy**: Single table (`recipes`). No joins required.\\n- **Date Handling**: The schema includes date scalars (`from_date`, `to_date`) but the source table `recipes` contains `start_time` and `end_time`. The report currently relies on parameter passthrough for the header dates. No row-level date filtering is applied in the base mapping, but date columns are registered for potential future filtering.\\n\\n## Transformations\\n1. **Error Calculation**: Subtracts Set Weight from Actual Weight.\\n2. **Percentage Calculation**: Divides the Error by the Set Weight and multiplies by 100.\\n3. **Formatting**: \\n   - Numeric columns (`row_set_wt_kg`, `row_ach_wt_kg`, `row_error_kg`) are formatted to 2 decimal places.\\n   - Percentage column (`row_error_pct`) is formatted to 2 decimal places.\\n   - `row_sl_no` is treated as an integer.\\n\\n## Parameters\\n- **Required**: None (all data is pulled from the `recipes` table).\\n- **Optional**: `date_from`, `date_to` (for filtering the `recipes` table by `start_time` if implemented).\\n\",\n  \"step5_requirements\": {\n    \"datasets\": {\n      \"header\": {\n        \"description\": \"Report metadata including print date and date range.\",\n        \"columns\": [\"print_date\", \"from_date\", \"to_date\"]\n      },\n      \"rows\": {\n        \"description\": \"Consumption details per recipe batch for Bin 1.\",\n        \"columns\": [\"row_sl_no\", \"row_material_name\", \"row_set_wt_kg\", \"row_ach_wt_kg\", \"row_error_kg\", \"row_error_pct\"],\n        \"grouping\": [],\n        \"ordering\": [\"row_sl_no\"]\n      },\n      \"totals\": {\n        \"description\": \"No aggregate totals defined.\",\n        \"columns\": []\n      }\n    },\n    \"semantics\": \"The report maps directly to the `recipes` table. `row_sl_no` maps to the primary key `rowid`.       font-size: 12pt;\n        line-height: 1.3;\n        color: #000;\n        margin: 0;\n        padding: 0;\n    }\n\n    .container {\n        width: 100%;\n        max-width: 210mm;\n        margin: 0 auto;\n    }\n\n    /* Header Info Section */\n    #report-header {\n        margin-bottom: 10px;\n        display: flex;\n        flex-wrap: wrap;\n        justify-content: space-between;\n    }\n\n    .header-col {\n        width: 48%;\n        display: flex;\n        flex-direction: column;\n        gap: 3px;\n    }\n\n    .header-row {\n        display: flex;\n        align-items: baseline;\n        font-size: 12pt;\n    }\n\n    .header-label {\n        font-weight: bold;\n        width: 110px;\n        flex-shrink: 0;\n    }\n\n    .header-separator {\n        width: 5px;\n        flex-shrink: 0;\n        text-align: center;\n    }\n\n    .header-value {\n        flex-grow: 1;\n    }\n\n    /* Title */\n    h1 {\n        text-align: center;\n        font-size: 24pt;\n        font-weight: bold;\n        margin: 10px 0 20px 0;\n        text-transform: none;\n    }\n\n    /* Batch Block */\n    .batch-block {\n        margin-bottom: 15px;\n        page-break-inside: avoid;\n    }\n\n    /* Batch Header */\n    .batch-header {\n        display: flex;\n        justify-content: space-between;\n        align-items: center;\n        margin-bottom: 0;\n        padding-bottom: 0;\n        font-weight: bold;\n        font-size: 13pt;\n    }\n\n    .batch-times {\n        display: flex;\n        gap: 20px;\n    }\n\n    /* Tables */\n    table {\n        width: 100%;\n        border-collapse: collapse;\n        table-layout: fixed;\n        font-size: 12pt;\n        margin-bottom: 0;\n    }\n\n    th, td {\n        border: var(--border-style) var(--border-color);\n        padding: 5px 8px;\n        vertical-align: middle;\n    }\n\n    th {\n        font-weight: bold;\n        text-align: center;\n        background-color: #fff;\n        padding: 6px 8px;\n    }\n\n    td {\n        text-align: center;\n        font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums;\n    }\n\n    /* Column Specifics */\n    .col-sln { width: var(--col-sln-width); }\n    .col-name { width: var(--col-name-width); text-align: left; padding-left: 8px; }\n    .col-num { width: var(--col-num-width); text-align: right; padding-right: 8px; }\n    .col-start { width: var(--col-start-width); text-align: right; }\n    .col-end { width: var(--col-end-width); text-align: right; }\n\n    /* Total Row */\n    .total-row td:first-child {\n        font-weight: bold;\n        text-align: left;\n        padding-left: 8px;\n    }\n    .total-row td {\n        font-weight: bold;\n    }\n\n</style>\n</head>\n<body>\n\n<div class=\"container\">\n\n    \n    <div id=\"report-header\">\n        <div class=\"header-col\">\n            <div class=\"header-row\">\n                <span class=\"header-label\">Plant name</span>\n                <span class=\"header-separator\">:</span>\n                <span class=\"header-value\">{plant_name}</span>\n            </div>\n            <div class=\"header-row\">\n                <span class=\"header-label\">Location</span>\n                <span class=\"header-separator\">:</span>\n                <span class=\"header-value\">{location}</span>\n            </div>\n            <div class=\"header-row\">\n                <span class=\"header-label\">Print Date</span>\n                <span class=\"header-separator\">:</span>\n                <span class=\"header-value\">{print_date}</span>\n            </div>\n        </div>\n        <div class=\"header-col\">\n            <div class=\"header-row\">\n                <span class=\"header-label\">From</span>\n                <span class=\"header-separator\">:</span>\n                <span class=\"header-value\">{from_date}</span>\n            </div>\n            <div class=\"header-row\">\n                <span class=\"header-label\">To</span>\n                <span class=\"header-separator\">:</span>\n                <span class=\"header-value\">{to_date}</span>\n            </div>\n            <div class=\"header-row\">\n                <span class=\"header-label\">Batch No</span>\n                <span class=\"header-separator\">:</span>\n                <span class=\"header-value\">{batch_no}</span>\n            </div>\n        </div>\n    </div>\n\n    \n    <h1>Consumption report</h1>\n\n    \n    <!-- BEGIN:BLOCK_REPEAT batches -->\n    <div class=\"batch-block\">\n        <div class=\"batch-header\">\n            <span>{batch_number}</span>\n            <div class=\"batch-times\">\n                <span>Start {start_time}</span>\n                <span>End {end_time}</span>\n            </div>\n        </div>\n        <table>\n            <thead>\n                <tr>\n                    <th class=\"col-sln\" data-label=\"sl_no\">Sl. No.</th>\n                    <th class=\"col-name\" data-label=\"material_name\">Material name</th>\n                    <th class=\"col-num\" data-label=\"set_wt_kg\">Set. wt(Kg)</th>\n                    <th class=\"col-num\" data-label=\"ach_wt_kg\">Ach. wt(Kg)</th>\n                    <th class=\"col-num\" data-label=\"error_kg\">Error(Kg)</th>\n                    <th class=\"col-num\" data-label=\"error_percent\">Error %</th>\n                </tr>\n            </thead>\n            <tbody>\n                <tr>\n                    <td class=\"col-sln\">{row_sl_no}</td>\n                    <td class=\"col-name\">{row_material_name}</td>\n                    <td class=\"col-num\">{row_set_wt_kg}</td>\n                    <td class=\"col-num\">{row_ach_wt_kg}</td>\n                    <td class=\"col-num\">{row_error_kg}</td>\n                    <td class=\"col-num\">{row_error_percent}</td>\n                </tr>\n            </tbody>\n            <tfoot>\n                <tr class=\"total-row\">\n                    <td colspan=\"2\">Total for batch</td>\n                    <td class=\"col-num\">{total_set_wt_kg}</td>\n                    <td class=\"col-num\">{total_ach_wt_kg}</td>\n                    <td class=\"col-num\">{total_error_kg}</td>\n                    <td class=\"col-num\">{total_error_percent}</td>\n                </tr>\n            </tfoot>\n        </table>\n    </div>\n    <!-- END:BLOCK_REPEAT -->\n\n</div>\n\n</body>\n</html>\n<!--END_HTML-->"

## 2026-04-29T10:34:00+00:00Z - v3_df

```json
{
  "id": "chatcmpl-b1d849b67a481854",
  "model": "Qwen/Qwen3.5-27B-FP8",
  "choices": [
    {
      "index": 0,
      "message": {
        "role": "assistant",
        "content": "{\n  \"overview_md\": \"# Consumption Report Contract\\n\\n## Executive Summary\\nThis contract defines the data mapping for a Consumption Report generated from sensor telemetry data. The report aggregates flow meter readings (`neuract__FM_TABLE`) to calculate batch-level consumption metrics. It structures data into batches based on time intervals, calculating set weights, achieved weights, and error margins for each material batch.\\n\\n## Token Inventory\\n- **Scalars**: Plant details, location, print date, report period (From/To), and report title. Most are static or derived from parameters.\\n- **Row Tokens**: Batch identifiers, timestamps (start/end), sequence numbers, material names, and calculated weight/error metrics per row.\\n- **Totals**: Aggregated sums for set weight, achieved weight, and error weight per batch, plus the average error percentage.\\n\\n## Mapping Table\\n- **Time Source**: `neuract__FM_TABLE.timestamp_utc` is the primary timestamp for row ordering and batch grouping.\\n- **Weight Source**: `neuract__FM_TABLE.FM_101_TOTALIZER` is used as the proxy for weight accumulation (Set/Achieved) in the absence of explicit weight columns in the catalog.\\n- **Material Source**: `neuract__device_mappings.field_key` provides the material identifier.\\n- **Calculations**:\\n  - `row_error_kg` = `row_set_wt_kg` - `row_ach_wt_kg`\\n  - `row_error_percent` = (`row_error_kg` / `row_set_wt_kg`) * 100\\n\\n## Join & Date Rules\\n- **Join**: Self-join on `neuract__FM_TABLE` using `timestamp_utc` as the key to simulate batch grouping logic in a flat DataFrame context.\\n- **Date Columns**: `neuract__FM_TABLE.timestamp_utc` is the sole date column, requiring `date_from` and `date_to` filters.\\n\\n## Transformations\\n1. **Reshape**: No complex melting required; data is treated as a time-series stream.\\n2. **Formatting**: All timestamps formatted to `dd-mm-yyyy HH:MM:SS`. All numeric weights to 2 decimal places. Percentages to 2 decimal places.\\n3. **Aggregation**: Totals are computed per batch (grouped by `row_batch_num`).\\n\\n## Parameters\\n- **Required**: `date_from`, `date_to` (for filtering the time range).\\n- **Optional**: `batch_no` (specific batch filter, though the report iterates batches).\\n\",\n  \"step5_requirements\": {\n    \"datasets\": {\n      \"header\": {\n        \"description\": \"Static report metadata and user-defined date range.\",\n        \"columns\": [\"plant_name\", \"location\", \"print_date\", \"from_date\", \"to_date\", \"batch_no\", \"report_title\"]\n      },\n      \"rows\": {\n        \"description\": \"Time-series consumption records grouped by batch.\",\n        \"columns\": [\"row_batch_num\", \"row_start_time\", \"row_end_time\", \"row_sl_no\", \"row_material_name\", \"row_set_wt_kg\", \"row_ach_wt_kg\", \"row_error_kg\", \"row_error_percent\"],\n        \"grouping\": [\"row_batch_num\"],\n        \"ordering\": [\"row_start_time\"]\n      },\n      \"totals\": {\n        \"description\": \"Batch-level aggregates for weight and error metrics.\",\n        \"columns\": [\"total_set_wt_kg\", \"total_ach_wt_kg\", \"total_error_kg\", \"total_error_percent\"]\n      }\n    },\n    \"semantics\": \"Parameters `date_from` and `date_to` act as filters on the `timestamp_utc` column. `batch_no` is a passthrough if provided, otherwise derived from the data stream. Row tokens represent individual sensor snapshots or calculated batch intervals.\",\n    \"parameters\": {\n      \"required\": [\n        {\"name\": \"date_from\", \"type\": \"date\"},\n        {\"name\": \"date_to\", \"type\": \"date\"}\n      ],\n      \"optional\": [\n        {\"name\": \"batch_no\", \"type\": \"string\"}\n      ]\n    },\n    \"transformations\": [\n      \"Map `timestamp_utc` to `row_start_time` and `row_end_time` with formatting.\",\n      \"Calculate `row_error_kg` by subtracting achieved weight from set weight.\",\n      \"Calculate `row_error_percent` by dividing error kg by set weight and multiplying by 100.\",\n      \"Aggregate totals per batch using sum for weights and mean for percentage.\"\n    ]\n  },\n  \"contract\": {\n    \"tokens\": {\n      \"scalars\": [\"plant_name\", \"location\", \"print_date\", \"from_date\", \"to_date\", \"batch_no\", \"report_title\"],\n      \"row_tokens\": [\"row_batch_num\", \"row_start_time\", \"row_end_time\", \"row_sl_no\", \"row_material_name\", \"row_set_wt_kg\", \"row_ach_wt_kg\", \"row_error_kg\", \"row_error_percent\"],\n      \"totals\": [\"total_set_wt_kg\", \"total_ach_wt_kg\", \"total_error_kg\", \"total_error_percent\"]\n    },\n    \"mapping\": {\n      \"plant_name\": \"neuract__device_mappings.device_id\",\n      \"location\": \"neuract__device_mappings.device_id\",\n      \"print_date\": \"PARAM:print_date\",\n      \"from_date\": \"PARAM:date_from\",\n      \"to_date\": \"PARAM:date_to\",\n      \"batch_no\": \"PARAM:batch_no\",\n      \"report_title\": \"neuract__device_mappings.device_id\",\n      \"row_batch_num\": \"neuract__FM_TABLE.timestamp_utc\",\n      \"row_start_time\": \"neuract__FM_TABLE.timestamp_utc\",\n      \"row_end_time\": \"neuract__FM_TABLE.timestamp_utc\",\n      \"row_sl_no\": \"neuract__FM_TABLE.timestamp_utc\",\n      \"row_material_name\": \"neuract__device_mappings.field_key\",\n      \"row_set_wt_kg\": \"neuract__FM_TABLE.FM_101_TOTALIZER\",\n      \"row_ach_wt_kg\": \"neuract__FM_TABLE.FM_101_TOTALIZER\",\n      \"row_error_kg\": \"UNRESOLVED\",\n      \"row_error_percent\": \"UNRESOLVED\",\n      \"total_set_wt_kg\": \"UNRESOLVED\",\n      \"total_ach_wt_kg\": \"UNRESOLVED\",\n      \"total_error_kg\": \"UNRESOLVED\",\n      \"total_error_percent\": \"UNRESOLVED\"\n    },\n    \"unresolved\": [],\n    \"join\": {\n      \"parent_table\": \"neuract__FM_TABLE\",\n      \"parent_key\": \"timestamp_utc\",\n      \"child_table\": \"neuract__FM_TABLE\",\n      \"child_key\": \"timestamp_utc\"\n    },\n    \"date_columns\": {\n      \"neuract__FM_TABLE\": \"timestamp_utc\"\n    },\n    \"filters\": {\n      \"optional\": {\n        \"date_from\": \"neuract__FM_TABLE.timestamp_utc\",\n        \"date_to\": \"neuract__FM_TABLE.timestamp_utc\"\n      }\n    },\n    \"reshape_rules\": [],\n    \"row_computed\": {\n      \"row_start_time\": {\n        \"op\": \"format_date\",\n        \"column\": \"neuract__FM_TABLE.timestamp_utc\",\n        \"format\": \"%d-%m-%Y %H:%M:%S\"\n      },\n      \"row_end_time\": {\n        \"op\": \"format_date\",\n        \"column\": \"neuract__FM_TABLE.timestamp_utc\",\n        \"format\": \"%d-%m-%Y %H:%M:%S\"\n      },\n      \"row_error_kg\": {\n        \"op\": \"subtract\",\n        \"left\": \"row_set_wt_kg\",\n        \"right\": \"row_ach_wt_kg\"\n      },\n      \"row_error_percent\": {\n        \"op\": \"multiply\",\n        \"left\": {\n          \"op\": \"divide\",\n          \"numerator\": \"row_error_kg\",\n          \"denominator\": \"row_set_wt_kg\"\n        },\n        \"right\": 100\n      }\n    },\n    \"totals_math\": {\n      \"total_set_wt_kg\": {\n        \"op\": \"sum\",\n        \"column\": \"row_set_wt_kg\"\n      },\n      \"total_ach_wt_kg\": {\n        \"op\": \"sum\",\n        \"column\": \"row_ach_wt_kg\"\n      },\n      \"total_error_kg\": {\n        \"op\": \"sum\",\n \"total_set_wt_kg\": {\n        \"op\": \"sum\",\n        \"column\": \"row_set_wt_kg\"\n      },\n      \"total_ach_wt_kg\": {\n        \"op\": \"sum\",\n        \"column\": \"row_ach_wt_kg\"\n ## 2026-04-29T11:13:09+00:00Z - v3_df

```json
{
  "id": "chatcmpl-a2633c14baa5d020",
  "model": "Qwen/Qwen3.5-27B-FP8",
  "choices": [
    {
      "index": 0,
      "message": {
        "role": "assistant",
        "content": "{\n  \"overview_md\": \"# Consumption Report Mapping Contract\\n\\n## Executive Summary\\nThis contract defines the data pipeline for a **Consumption Report** generated from industrial sensor data. The report aggregates batch-level consumption metrics (Set Weight, Achieved Weight, Error) derived from Flow Meter (`FM_TABLE`) and Level Transmitter (`LT_TABLE`) data. The pipeline maps raw sensor readings to report tokens, computes row-level error metrics, and aggregates totals per batch. No SQL is used; all logic is expressed via declarative operations.\\n\\n## Token Inventory\\n- **Scalars (Header):** Plant name, Location, Print Date, Date Range (From/To), Batch No.\\n- **Row Tokens (Detail):** Serial No, Material Name, Set Weight (Kg), Achieved Weight (Kg), Error (Kg), Error (%).\\n- **Totals (Batch Summary):** Batch ID, Start/End Timestamps, Total Set Weight, Total Achieved Weight, Total Error, Total Error %.\\n\\n## Mapping Strategy\\n- **Source Data:** Primarily `neuract__FM_TABLE` for flow/weight data and `neuract__LT_TABLE` for level/weight context. `neuract__ANALYSER_TABLE` provides environmental context if needed.\\n- **Key Logic:**\\n  - `row_set_wt_kg` and `row_ach_wt_kg` are mapped from specific Flow Meter totalizer columns.\\n  - `row_error_kg` is computed as `Set - Achieved`.\\n  - `row_error_pct` is computed as `(Error / Set) * 100`.\\n  - Timestamps are formatted using `format_date` ops.\\n- **Parameters:** `from_date` and `to_date` are required filters for the time range. `batch_no` is a dynamic filter.\\n\\n## Join & Date Rules\\n- **Join:** Self-join on `neuract__FM_TABLE` (acting as both parent and child for this single-table scope) keyed by `timestamp_utc` to align with batch windows.\\n- **Date Columns:** `neuract__FM_TABLE.timestamp_utc` is the primary date source.\\n- **Filters:** `date_from` and `date_to` map to the timestamp column for filtering.\\n\\n## Transformations\\n- **Row Computed:** Subtraction for error, division for percentage.\\n- **Totals Math:** Summation of weights, weighted average or sum for error percentage.\\n- **Formatting:** Dates formatted as `dd-mm-yyyy hh:mm:ss`, numbers as `number(2)`.\\n\\n## Parameters\\n- **Required:** `from_date`, `to_date` (Date), `batch_no` (String).\\n- **Optional:** None (Plant/Location are static or derived from context).\",\n  \"step5_requirements\": {\n    \"datasets\": {\n      \"header\": {\n        \"description\": \"Report metadata including plant details, print date, and filter ranges.\",\n        \"columns\": [\n          \"plant_name\",\n          \"location\",\n          \"print_date\",\n          \"from_date\",\n          \"to_date\",\n          \"batch_no\"\n        ]\n      },\n      \"rows\": {\n        \"description\": \"Line items for material consumption within a batch, showing set vs achieved weights and The report aggregates data from the `recipes` table, which contains wide-format columns for 12 bins (content, set point, actual weight). The pipeline reshapes this wide data into a long format to display individual bin consumption rows, calculates error metrics (weight difference and percentage), and groups results by batch.\\n\\n## Token Inventory\\n- **Scalars (Header):** Plant name, Location, Print Date, Date Range, Batch No, Report Title, Batch Number, Start/End Times.\\n- **Row Tokens:** Serial Number, Material Name, Set Weight, Actual Weight, Error (Kg), Error (%).\\n- **Totals:** Sum of Set/Actual/Error weights, Average Error %.\\n\\n## Mapping Strategy\\n1. **Source Table:** `recipes` is the primary source for all bin data.\\n2. **Reshape (Melt):** The wide columns (`bin1_content`...`bin12_content`, `bin1_sp`...`bin12_sp`, `bin1_act`...`bin12_act`) are melted into three logical columns: `row_material_name`, `row_set_wt_kg`, and `row_ach_wt_kg`.\\n3. **Computed Metrics:**\\n   - `row_error_kg` = `row_ach_wt_kg` - `row_set_wt_kg`\\n   - `row_error_pct` = (`row_error_kg` / `row_set_wt_kg`) * 100\\n4. **Aggregation:** Totals are calculated per batch using `sum` for weights and `mean` for percentages.\\n5. **Formatting:** Timestamps are formatted to `dd-mm-yyyy hh:mm:ss`. Numeric values use standard 2-decimal formatting, except error percentages which may require higher precision if domain-specific (defaulting to 2).\\n\\n## Join & Date Rules\\n- **Join:** Self-join logic is not required as all data resides in `recipes`. The `parent` and `child` tables are set to `recipes` with `id` as the key to satisfy structural requirements.\\n- **Date Filtering:** The report supports filtering by `start_time` and `end_time` from the `recipes` table.\\n\\n## Transformations\\n- **Reshape:** Converts 12 bin columns into 12 rows per recipe.\\n- **Date Formatting:** Applies `format_date` to `start_time` and `end_time`.\\n- **Numeric Formatting:** Applies `number(2)` to weights and percentages.\\n- **Serial Numbers:** Generated dynamically per batch.\\n\\n## Parameters\\n- **Required:** None (static defaults         "content": "{\n  \"overview_md\": \"# Consumption Report Contract\\n\\n## Executive Summary\\nThis contract defines the data mapping for a **Consumption Report** generated from the `recipes` table. The report tracks material consumption per batch, comparing set weights against actual weights to calculate errors. Data is unpivoted from 12 bin columns into a single row-per-material format for detailed analysis.\\n\\n## Token Inventory\\n- **Scalars**: Plant metadata, date range, batch identifiers, and timestamps.\\n- **Row Tokens**: Sequential number, material name, set weight, actual weight, error (kg), and error (%).\\n- **Totals**: Aggregated sums for set weight, actual weight, error, and overall error percentage.\\n\\n## Mapping Table\\n| Token | Source / Logic | Type |\\n|-------|----------------|------|\\n| `plant_name` | LITERAL: Costal Plant | Scalar |\\n| `location` | LITERAL: Production Floor | Scalar |\\n| `print_date` | CURRENT_DATE (Formatted) | Scalar |\\n| `from_date` | Derived from `start_time` | Scalar |\\n| `to_date` | Derived from `end_time` | Scalar |\\n| `batch_no` | `recipes.id` | Scalar |\\n| `batch_id` | `recipes.recipe_name` | Scalar |\\n| `start_time` | `recipes.start_time` (Formatted) | Scalar |\\n| `end_time` | `recipes.end_time` (Formatted) | Scalar |\\n| `row_sl_no` | ROW_NUMBER | Row |\\n| `row_material_name` | Unpivot `bin1_content`...`bin12_content` | Row |\\n| `row_set_wt_kg` | Unpivot `bin1_sp`...`bin12_sp` | Row |\\n| `row_ach_wt_kg` | Unpivot `bin1_act`...`bin12_act` | Row |\\n| `row_error_kg` | `row_ach_wt_kg` - `row_set_wt_kg` | Row (Computed) |\\n| `row_error_pct` | `row_error_kg` / `row_set_wt_kg` * 100 | Row (Computed) |\\n| `total_set_wt_kg` | SUM(`row_set_wt_kg`) | Total |\\n| `total_ach_wt_kg` | SUM(`row_ach_wt_kg`) | Total |\\n| `total_error_kg` | SUM(`row_error_kg`) | Total |\\n| `total_error_pct` | SUM(`row_error_kg`) / SUM(`row_set_wt_kg`) * 100 | Total |\\n\\n## Join & Date Rules\\n- **Join**: Self-referential on `recipes` table (Parent: `recipes.id`, Child: `recipes.id`).\\n- **Date Columns**: `recipes.start_time` and `recipes.end_time` drive the report range.\\n- **Filters**: `date_from` and `date_to` map to `start_time` and `end_time` respectively.\\n\\n## Transformations\\n1. **Reshape**: Melt 12 bin columns (content, set weight, actual weight) into 3 long-format columns.\\n2. **Compute Error**: Calculate difference and percentage error per row.\\n3. **Aggregate**: Sum totals per batch.\\n4. **Format**: Apply date formatting to timestamps and numeric formatting to weights/percentages.\\n\\n## Parameters\\n- **Required**: None (Report is static per batch ID).\\n- **Optional**: `date_from`, `date_to` (for filtering batches).\\n\",\n  \"step5_requirements\": {\n    \"datasets\": {\n      \"header\": {\n        \"description\": \"Static report metadata and batch identification.\",\n        \"columns\": [\"plant_name\", \"location\", \"print_date\", \"from_date\", \"to_date\", \"batch_no\", \"batch_id\", \"start_time\", \"end_time\"]\n      },\n      \"rows\": {\n        \"description\": \"Unpivoted material consumption details per bin.\",\n        \"columns\": [\"row_sl_no\", \"row_material_name\", \"row_set_wt_kg\", \"row_ach_wt_kg\", \"row_error_kg\", provided. Within a batch, all 12 bins are expanded into individual rows. The report consolidates header information (vendor and customer details), a line-item table, and financial totals. The pipeline joins `invoices` (parent) with `invoice_items` (child) to render a complete invoice document.\\n\\n## Token Inventory\\n- **Scalars (Header/Footer):** 21 tokens covering vendor details, invoice metadata, customer billing info, payment instructions, and final financial totals.\\n- **Row Tokens:** 24 tokens representing 6 fixed rows of line items (Description, Qty, Unit Price, Total). These are mapped dynamically from the `invoice_items` table.\\n- **Totals:** Financial aggregates (Subtotal, Discount, Tax, Balance Due) are derived from scalar mappings or computed totals.\\n\\n## Mapping Table\\n| Token Category | Source Table | Key Mappings |\\n| :--- | :--- | :--- |\\n| **Vendor** | `invoices` | `vendor_name`, `billing_address`, `phone`, `email` |\\n| **Invoice Meta** | `invoices` | `issue_date`, `invoice_number`, `notes` |\\n| **Customer** | `customers` | `customer_name`, `billing_address`, `city`, `state`, `postal_code`, `country` |\\n| **Line Items** | `invoice_items` | `description`, `quantity`, `unit_price`, `line_total` |\\n| **Financials** | `invoices` | `subtotal`, `discount_amount`, `tax_amount`, `total_amount` |\\n\\n## Join & Date Rules\\n- **Join Strategy:** `invoices` (parent) joined to `invoice_items` (child) on `invoice_number`.\\n- **Date Handling:** `issue_date` is formatted as `dd-mm-yyyy HH:MM:SS` for display.\\n- **Filtering:** Optional date range filters (`date_from`, `date_to`) applied to `invoices.issue_date`.\\n\\n## Transformations\\n- **Line Item Calculation:** `line_total` is validated/computed as `quantity * unit_price` (declarative multiply).\\n- **Totals Logic:** `balance_due` is computed as `total_amount - (sum of payments)` if payments exist, otherwise defaults to `total_amount`. For this static template, we map `total_amount` directly to `balance_due` assuming full balance or use the explicit `total_amount` field.\\n- **Formatting:** All currency values use `number(2)` formatting. Dates use `format_date`.\\n\\n## Parameters\\n- **Required:** `invoice_number` (to fetch specific invoice).\\n- **Optional:** `date_from`, `date_to` (for filtering invoice lists if this were a list Inventory\\n- **Scalars**: 16 tokens (Invoice meta, customer details, dates, totals).\\n- **Row Tokens**: 7 tokens (Line items: number, description, qty, rate, discount, amount).\\n- **Totals**: 0 explicit tokens (handled via scalar calculations).\\n\\n## Mapping Strategy\\n- **Direct Mappings**: Most fields map directly to catalog columns (e.g., `invoice_number` \u2192 `invoices.invoice_number`).\\n- **Computed Fields**:\\n  - `balance_due`: Calculated as `total_amount` - `payment_made`.\\n  - `row_discount`: Calculated as `unit_price` * `quantity` - `line_total` Rules\\n- **Join**: `invoices` (parent) joined to `invoice_items` (child) on `invoice_number`. `customers` and `payments` are joined to `invoices` on respective keys.\\n- **Date Columns**: tokens use `format_date` op.\\n- **Numeric Formatting**: Currency and quantity fields use `number(2)` or `currency(2)`.\\n- **Aggregations**: Totals are computed using declarative math ops on row ```json
{
  "id": "chatcmpl-ab67d638d3883a23",
  "model": "Qwen/Qwen3.5-27B-FP8",
  "choices": [
    {
      "index": 0,
      "message": {
        "role": "assistant",
        "content": "{\n  \"overview_md\": \"# Invoice Report Contract Overview\\n\\n## Executive Summary\\nThis contract defines the mapping logic for a Basic Invoice report pipeline using pandas DataFrames. The report renders line items from an invoice, displaying the item description and the calculated line total. The data source is derived from the `invoice_items` table, joined contextually with invoice metadata if required for filtering, though the current row tokens map directly to `invoice_items`.\\n\\n## Token Inventory\\n- **Row Tokens**: \\n  - `row_description`: Maps to the textual description of the line item.\\n  - `row_total`: Maps to the monetary value of the line item.\\n- **Scalar Tokens**: None defined in the current schema.\\n- **Total Tokens**: None defined in the current schema.\\n\\n## Mapping Table\\n| Token | Source Column | Type | Computation |\\n|-------|---------------|------|-------------|\\n| `row_description` | `invoice_items.description` | String | Direct |\\n| `row_total` | `invoice_items.line_total` | Numeric | Direct |\\n\\n## Join & Date Rules\\n- **Join Strategy**: The report operates primarily on the `invoice_items` table. For a full invoice context, `invoice_items` is conceptually linked to `invoices` via `invoice_number`, but the current row mapping requires only `invoice_items`.\\n- **Date Handling**: No date tokens are currently mapped to rows. If invoice date filtering is added later, `invoices.issue_date` will be used.\\n\\n## Transformations\\n- No row-level computations (add, subtract, etc.) are required as `line_total` is pre-calculated in the source.\\n- No reshaping (MELT/UNION) is required; the data is already in a flat row format suitable for the table.\\n\\n## Parameters\\n- No dynamic parameters are currently required for the row tokens. Future enhancements may include `invoice_number` as a filter parameter.\\n\",\n  \"step5_requirements\": {\n    \"datasets\": {\n      \"header\": {\n        \"description\": \"Static header fields for the invoice (not mapped to dynamic tokens in this schema).\",\n        \"columns\": []\n      },\n      \"rows\": {\n        \"description\": \"Line items for the invoice, showing description and total amount.\",\n        \"columns\": [\"row_description\", \"row_total\"],\n        \"grouping\": [],\n        \"ordering\": [\"row_description\"]\n      },\n      \"totals\": {\n        \"description\": \"Aggregated totals for the invoice (not mapped to dynamic tokens in this schema).\",\n        \"columns\": []\n      }\n    },\n    \"semantics\": \"The report displays a list of line items. `row_description` is a direct text mapping. `row_total` is a direct numeric mapping. No filtering parameters are currently active.\",\n    \"parameters\": {\n      \"required\": [],\n      \"optional\": []\n    },\n    \"transformations\": [\n      \"Map `row_description` directly to `invoice_items.description`.\",\n      \"Map `row_total` directly to `invoice_items.line_total`.\",\n      \"Order rows by `row_description` (default fallback).\"\n    ]\n  },\n  \"contract\": {\n    \"tokens\": {\n      \"scalars\": [],\n      \"row_tokens\": [\n        \"row_description\",\n        \"row_total\"\n      ],\n      \"totals\": []\n    },\n    \"mapping\": {\n      \"row_description\": \"invoice_items.description\",\n      \"row_total\": \"invoice_items.line_total\"\n    },\n    \"unresolved\": [],\n    \"join\": {\n      \"parent_table\": \"invoice_items\",\n      \"parent_key\": \"id\",\n      \"child_table\": \"invoice_items\",\n      \"child_key\": \"id\"\n    },\n    \"date_columns\": {},\n    \"filters\": {\n      \"optional\": {}\n    },\n    \"reshape_rules\": [],\n    \"row_computed\": {},\n    \"totals_math\": {},\n    \"totals\": {},\n    \"formatters\": {\n      \"row_total\": \"number(2)\"\n    },\n    \"order_by\": {\n      \"rows\": [\"row_description ASC\"]\n    },\n    \"header_tokens\": [],\n    \"row_tokens\": [\n      \"row_description\",\n      \"row_total\"\n    ],\n    \"row_order\": [\n      \"row_description ASC\"\n    ],\n    \"literals\": {},\n    \"notes\": \"Basic invoice line item report. class=\"invoice-meta\">\n      <div><strong>DATE:</strong> {date}</div>\n      <div><strong>INVOICE</strong> {invoice_number}</div>\n    </div>\n  </div>\n\n  <!-- Address Block -->\n  <div ## 2026-04-29T14:08:47+00:00Z - v3_df

```json
{
  "id": "chatcmpl-b107902f8d66ab3c",
  "model": "Qwen/Qwen3.5-27B-FP8",
  "choices": [
    {
      "index": 0,
      "message": {
        "role": "assistant",
        "content": "{\n  \"overview_md\": \"# Invoice Report Contract\\n\\n## Executive Summary\\nThis contract defines the data mapping and transformation logic for a standard invoice report. The report aggregates header information from the `invoices` and `customers` tables, while line items are sourced from `invoice_items`. The logic ensures proper formatting of dates, currency values, and address concatenation using declarative operations compatible with pandas DataFrames.\\n\\n## Token Inventory\\n- **Scalars**: 12 tokens covering invoice metadata (date, number, terms), vendor details, and client details (name, email, address).\\n- **Row Tokens**: 4 tokens representing invoice line items (description, quantity, price, amount).\\n- **Totals**: No explicit totals tokens defined in the schema, but the HTML template expects Subtotal, Tax, and Balance Due. (Note: Contract focuses on mapping provided schema tokens).\\n\\n## Mapping Table\\n| Token | Source / Logic | Type |\\n| :--- | :--- | :--- |\\n| `date` | `invoices.issue_date` | Date (Formatted) |\\n| `due_date` | `invoices.due_date` | Date (Formatted) |\\n| `invoice_number` | `invoices.invoice_number` | String |\\n| `company_name` | `invoices.vendor_name` | String |\\n| `company_email` | Literal: `contact@riverbend.com` | String |\\n| `company_address_1` | Literal: `Riverbend Mechanical` | String |\\n| `company_address_2` | Literal: `Contact us for details` | String |\\n| `client_name` | `customers.customer_name` | String |\\n| `client_email` | `customers.email` | String |\\n| `client_address_1` | `customers.billing_address` | String |\\n| `client_address_2` | Concat: `city`, `state`, `postal_code` | String (Computed) |\\n| `terms` | Literal: `Net 30 days` | String |\\n| `notes` | `invoices.notes` | String |\\n| `row_item_description` | `invoice_items.description` | String |\\n| `row_quantity` | `invoice_items.quantity` | Number |\\n| `row_price` | `invoice_items.unit_price` | Number (Currency) |\\n| `row_amount` | `invoice_items.line_total` | Number (Currency) |\\n\\n## Join & Date Rules\\n- **Parent Table**: `invoices` (Key: `invoice_number`)\\n- **Child Table**: `invoice_items` (Key: `invoice_number`)\\n- **Date Columns**: `invoices.issue_date`, `invoices.due_date`\\n- **Filters**: Optional `date_from` and `date_to` filters applied to `invoices.issue_date`.\\n\\n## Transformations\\n1. **Date Formatting**: All date tokens are formatted as `DD-MM-YYYY HH:MM:SS` using `format_date` operations.\\n2. **Address Concatenation**: `client_address_2` is constructed by concatenating `customers.city`, `customers.state`, and `customers.postal_code` with a separator.\\n3. **Numeric Formatting**: `row_price` and `row_amount` are formatted as currency (2 decimals).\\n4. **Literal Injection**: Company details and terms are injected as static literals as per the override instructions.\\n\\n## Parameters\\n- **Required**: None (All data sourced from tables or literals).\\n- **Optional**: `date_from`, `date_to` (for filtering invoices by issue date).\",\n  \"step5_requirements\": {\n    \"datasets\": {\n      \"header\": {\n        \"description\": \"Invoice metadata and address details for the header section.\",\n        \"columns\": [\n          \"date\",\n          \"invoice_number\",\n          \"company_name\",\n          \"company_email\",\n          \"company_address_1\",\n {
  "id": "chatcmpl-beb3ba2d698e95d6",

  "choices": [
    {
      "index": 0,
      "message": {
        "role": "assistant",
        "content": "{\n  \"overview_md\": \"# Consumption Report Contract\\n\\n## Executive Summary\\nThis report generates a detailed consumption analysis for manufacturing batches, comparing set weights against actual weights for 12 material bins per batch. The data is derived from the `recipes` table, which contains recipe definitions, set points, and actual consumption values. The report groups data by batch (recipe), calculates row-level errors (difference and percentage), and aggregates totals for each batch.\\n\\n## Token Inventory\\n- **Scalars**: Report header details (Plant, Location, Dates, Batch ID, Times) and Batch Totals.\\n- **Row Tokens**: Sequential number, Material Name, Set Weight, Actual Weight, Error (Kg), Error (%).\\n- **Totals**: Aggregated sums for Set Weight, Actual Weight, Error (Kg), and Error (%).\\n\\n## Mapping Strategy\\n- **Source Table**: `recipes` is the sole data source. No joins are required.\\n- **Reshaping**: The 12 bin columns (`bin1_content`...`bin12_content`, `bin1_sp`...`bin12_sp`, `bin1_act`...`bin12_act`) are unpivoted (MELT) into three logical columns: `row_material_name`, `row_set_wt_kg`, and `row_ach_wt_kg`.\\n- **Computed Columns**:\\n  - `row_error_kg`: Calculated as `row_ach_wt_kg - row_set_wt_kg`.\\n  - `row_error_pct`: Calculated as `(row_ach_wt_kg - row_set_wt_kg) / row_set_wt_kg * 100`, rounded to 2 decimals.\\n  - `row_sl_no`: Generated row number within the batch.\\n- **Timestamps**: `start_time` and `end_time` are formatted to `%d-%m-%Y %H:%M:%S`.\\n- **Static Values**: Plant name and location are hardcoded as per override instructions.\\n\\n## Join & Date Rules\\n- **Join**: Self-join on `recipes` (parent and child are the same) to satisfy contract structure, though logically a single table scan.\\n- **Date Filtering**: The report supports filtering by `start_time` and `end_time` via `date_from` and `date_to` parameters.\\n\\n## Transformations\\n1. **MELT**: Unpivot 12 bin columns into a long format.\\n2. **SUBTRACT**: Compute error in Kg.\\n3. **DIVIDE & MULTIPLY**: Compute error percentage.\\n4. **FORMAT_DATE**: Standardize timestamp display.\\n5. **FORMAT_NUMBER**: Ensure numeric consistency (2 decimals for weights, 2 decimals for percentages).\\n\\n## Parameters\\n- **Required**: None explicitly defined as user inputs, but `date_from` and `date_to` are available for optional filtering.\\n- **Optional**: `date_from`, `date_to` (mapped to `recipes.start_time` and `recipes.end_time`).\",\n  \"step5_requirements\": {\n    \"datasets\": {\n      \"header\": {\n        \"description\": \"Report metadata and batch context\",\n        \"columns\": [\"plant_name\", \"location\", \"print_date\", \"from_date\", \"to_date\", \"batch_no\", \"batch_id\", \"start_time\", \"end_time\", \"total_set_wt_kg\", \"total_ach_wt_kg\", \"total_error_kg\", \"total_error_pct\"]\n      },\n      \"rows\": {\n        \"description\": \"Line items for each material bin within a batch\",\n        \"columns\": [\"row_sl_no\", \"row_material_name\", \"row_set_wt_kg\", \"row_ach_wt_kg\", \"row_error_kg\", \"row_error_pct\"],\n        \"grouping\": [\"batch_id\"],\n        \"ordering\": [\"row_sl_no ASC\"]\n      },\n      \"totals\": {\n        \"description\": \"Aggregated metrics for the current batch\",\n        \"columns\": [\"total_set_wt_kg\", \"total_ach_wt_kg\", \"total_error_kg\", \"total_error_pct\"]\n      }\n    },\n    \"semantics\": \"The report iterates over each recipe (batch). For each batch, it expands the 12 bin columns into 12 rows. It calculates the variance between set and actual weights. Totals are computed per batch. Date filters restrict the batches included in the report.\",\n    \"parameters\": {\n      \"required\": [],\n      \"optional\": [\n        {\"name\": \"date_from\", \"type\": \"date\"},\n        {\"name\": \"date_to\", \"type\": \"date\"}\n      ]\n    },\n    \"transformations\": [\n      \"Unpivot 12 bin columns (content, sp, act) into a single row structure per bin.\",\n      \"Calculate row-level error as Actual - Set.\",\n      \"Calculate row-level error percentage as (Actual - Set) / Set * 100.\",\n      \"Format timestamps to DD-MM-YYYY HH:MM:SS.\",\n      \"Aggregate sums for Set, Actual, and Error weights per batch.\",\n      \"Calculate batch error percentage as Sum(Error) / Sum(Set) * 100.\"\n    ]\n  },\n  \"contract\": {\n    \"tokens\": {\n      \"scalars\": [\n        \"plant_name\",\n        \"location\",\n        \"print_date\",\n        \"from_date\",\n        \"to_date\",\n        \"batch_no\",\n        \"batch_id\",\n        \"start_time\",\n The report aggregates header metadata (company, customer, dates), line-item details (description, qty, rate, amount), and financial totals (subtotal, taxes, balance due). No SQL is used; all logic is expressed via declarative operation objects.\\n\\n## Token Inventory\\n- **Scalars**: 22 tokens covering invoice metadata, customer details, and summary financials.\\n- **Row Tokens**: 7 tokens for line-item details (index, description, qty, rate, discount, amount).\\n- **Totals**: 6 tokens for calculated financial summaries (Subtotal, Tax1, Tax2, Total, Payment, Balance Due).\\n\\n## Mapping Table\\n- **Header**: Maps `invoices` and `customers` tables to scalar tokens. Dates are formatted via `row_computed`.\\n- **Rows**: Maps `invoice_items` to row tokens. Calculated `row_amount` uses `multiply` (qty * rate).\\n- **Totals**: Aggregates row tokens using `sum` and `subtract` operations.\\n\\n## Join & Date Rules\\n- **Join**: `invoices` (parent) joined to `invoice_items` (child) on `invoice_number`. `customers` joined to `invoices` on `customer_id`.\\n- **Date Columns**: `invoices.issue_date` and `invoices.due_date` are formatted as `dd-mm-yyyy HH:MM:SS`.\\n\\n## Transformations\\n- **Row Computed**: \\n  - `row_amount` = `row_qty` * `row_rate`.\\n  - `row_description_main` = `invoice_items.description`.\\n  - `row_description_sub` = `invoice_items.category` (fallback if sub-desc missing).\\n- **Totals Math**:\\n  - `sub_total` = SUM(`row_amount`).\\n  - `total_amount` = `sub_total` + `tax1_value` + `tax2_value`.\\n  - `balance_due` = `total_amount` - `payment_made`.\\n- **Reshape**: None (single source table for rows).\\n\\n## Parameters\\n- **Required**: `invoice_number` (string) to filter the specific ## 2026-04-30T08:23:55+00:00Z - v3_df

```json
{
  "id": "chatcmpl-a94c6ccc67b78c8a",
  "model": "Qwen/Qwen3.5-27B-FP8",
  "choices": [
    {
      "index": 0,
      "message": {
        "role": "assistant",
        "content": "{\n  \"overview_md\": \"# Invoice Report Contract\\n\\n## Executive Summary\\nThis contract defines the data mapping for a Basic Invoice report rendered via a pandas DataFrame pipeline. The report displays line items from invoices, specifically mapping the `row_description` token to the `vendor_name` from the `invoices` table (as per override) and `row_total` to `total_amount` from the same table. The pipeline aggregates invoice-level data into a row-based format suitable for the provided HTML template.\\n\\n## Token Inventory\\n- **Scalars**: None (The template relies on static headers or implicit context).\\n- **Row Tokens**: \\n  - `row_description`: Represents the vendor or item description.\\n  - `row_total`: Represents the total monetary amount for the line.\\n- **Totals**: None defined in schema.\\n\\n## Mapping Table\\n| Token | Source Column | Logic |\\n| :--- | :--- | :--- |\\n| `row_description` | `invoices.vendor_name` | Direct mapping (Override applied) |\\n| `row_total` | `invoices.total_amount` | Direct mapping |\\n\\n## Join & Date Rules\\n- **Join Strategy**: The report operates on the `invoices` table as the parent. Since no child table is joined for the row detail in this specific override context, the child table mirrors the parent (`invoices`).\\n- **Date Columns**: `invoices.issue_date` is identified as the primary date column, enabling date filtering.\\n\\n## Transformations\\n- **Row Computed**: No complex row-level calculations (add/subtract) are required; direct column passthrough is used.\\n- **Formatting**: \\n  - `row_total` is formatted as a currency/number with 2 decimal places.\\n  - No timestamp formatting is required for the row tokens as they map to text and numeric columns.\\n\\n## Parameters\\n- **Required**: None explicitly defined in schema, but `date_from` and `date_to` are available as optional filters due to the presence of `issue_date`.\\n- **Optional**: `date_from`, `date_to` (derived from `invoices.issue_date`).\",\n  \"step5_requirements\": {\n    \"datasets\": {\n      \"header\": {\n        \"description\": \"Static header information (Invoice No, Date, Bill To, Ship To) is handled by the template structure; no dynamic scalar tokens are mapped in this schema.\",\n        \"columns\": []\n      },\n      \"rows\": {\n        \"description\": \"List of invoice line items or invoice summaries containing description and total amount.\",\n        \"columns\": [\n          \"row_description\",\n          \"row_total\"\n        ],\n        \"grouping\": [],\n        \"ordering\": [\n          \"row_description\"\n        ]\n      },\n      \"totals\": {\n        \"description\": \"No aggregate totals are defined in the schema for this report view.\",\n        \"columns\": []\n      }\n    },\n    \"semantics\": \"The report maps invoice-level data directly to row tokens. `row_description` pulls the vendor name (override), and `row_total` pulls the final invoice total. Filtering is supported by invoice date.\",\n    \"parameters\": {\n      \"required\": [],\n      \"optional\": [\n        {\n          \"name\": \"date_from\",\n          \"type\": \"date\"\n        },\n        {\n          \"name\": \"date_to\",\n          \"type\": \"date\"\n        }\n      ]\n    },\n    \"transformations\": [\n      \"Map 'row_description' to 'invoices.vendor_name' via override.\",\n      \"Map 'row_total' to 'invoices.total_amount'.\",\n      \"Apply numeric formatting (2 decimals) to 'row_total'.\",\n      \"Enable date filtering on 'invoices.issue_date'.\"\n    ]\n  },\n  \"contract\": {\n    \"tokens\": {\n      \"scalars\": [],\n      \"row_tokens\": [\n        \"row_description\",\n        \"row_total\"\n      ],\n      \"totals\": []\n    },\n    \"mapping\": {\n      \"row_description\": \"invoices.vendor_name\",\n      \"row_total\": \"invoices.total_amount\"\n    },\n    \"unresolved\": [],\n    \"join\": {\n      \"parent_table\": \"invoices\",\n      \"parent_key\": \"invoice_number\",\n      \"child_table\": \"invoices\",\n      \"child_key\": \"invoice_number\"\n    },\n    \"date_columns\": {\n      \"invoices\": \"issue_date\"\n    },\n    \"filters\": {\n      \"optional\": {\n        \"date_from\": \"invoices.issue_date\",\n        \"date_to\": \"invoices.issue_date\"\n      }\n    },\n    \"reshape_rules\": [],\n    \"row_computed\": {},\n    \"totals_math\": {},\n    \"totals\": {},\n    \"formatters\": {\n      \"row_total\": \"number(2)\"\n    },\n    \"order_by\": {\n      \"rows\": [\n        \"row_description ASC\"\n      ]\n    },\n    \"header_tokens\": [],\n    \"row_tokens\": [\n      \"row_description\",\n      \"row_total\"\n    ],\n    \"row_order\": [\n      \"row_description ASC\"\n    ],\n    \"literals\": {},\n    \"notes\": \"Mapping override applied for row_description to use vendor_name instead of item description. font-weight: bold;\n        border: 1px solid var(--primary-green);\n    }\n\n    .invoice-table td {\n        border: 1px solid var(--border-color);\n        padding: 8px 10px;\n        text-align: right;\n        vertical-align: middle;\n    }\n\n    .col-desc {\n        text-align: left;\n        width: var(--col-desc-width);\n    }\n\n    .col-qty {\n        width: var(--col-qty-width);\n    }\n\n    .col-price {\n        width: var(--col-price-width);\n    }\n\n    .col-total {\n        width: var(--col-total-width);\n    }\n\n    .row-stripe {\n        background-color: #f2f2f2;\n    }\n\n    /* Totals Section */\n    .totals-container {\n        display: flex;\n        justify-content: space-between;\n        margin-top: 10px;\n    }\n\n    .remarks-box {\n        width: 55%;\n        padding-right: 20px;\n    }\n\n    .totals-box {\n        width: 40%;\n    }\n\n    .total-row {\n        display: flex;\n        justify-content: space-between;\n        padding: 5px 10px;\n        border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-color);\n    }\n\n    .total-label {\n        text-align: right;\n        font-weight: bold;\n        color: #444;\n    }\n\n    .total-value {\n        text-align: right;\n        padding-right: 10px;\n    }\n\n    .balance-due {\n        background-color: var(--primary-green);\n        color: white;\n        font-weight: bold;\n        font-size: 16px;\n        border-bottom: 2px solid var(--border-color);\n    }\n\n    /* Footer Area */\n    .footer-area {\n        margin-top: 60px;\n        display: flex;\n        flex-direction: column;\n        justify-content: space-between;\n        height: 150px;\n    }\n\n    .payment-instructions {\n        margin-bottom: 20px;\n    }\n\n    .signatures {\n        display: flex;\n        justify-content: space-between;\n        margin-bottom: 20px;\n        color: #555;\n    }\n\n    .bottom-message {\n        font-size: 24px;\n        font-weight: bold;\n        margin-bottom: 20px;\n    }\n\n    .footer-logo {\n        text-align: right;\n        font-size: 12px;\n    }\n\n    .footer-logo img {\n        height: 30px;\n        vertical-align: middle;\n        margin-left: 10px;\n    }\n\n    .footer-bar {\n        height: 20px;\n        background-color: var(--primary-green);\n        margin-top: 20px;\n    }\n\n    @media print {\n        body { -webkit-print-color-adjust: exact; }\n        .page-container { width: 100%; padding: 0; margin: 0; }\n    }\n</style>\n</head>\n<body>\n\n<div class=\"page-container\">\n    <!-- Header -->\n    <div class=\"header-bar\">\n        <div class=\"logo-placeholder\">LOGO</div>\n        <div class=\"header-title\">Sample Invoice Template</div>\n    </div>\n\n    <!-- Top Info -->\n    <div class=\"top-info\">\n        <div class=\"company-details\">\n            <span class=\"section-title\">COMPANY NAME</span>\n            <div>{company_name_placeholder}</div>\n            <div>{company_address}</div>\n            <div>{company_phone}</div>\n            <div>{company_email}</div>\n        </div>\n        <div class=\"invoice-meta\">\n            <div class=\"meta-row\">\n                <span class=\"meta-label\">DATE</span>\n                <span class=\"meta-value\">{invoice_date}</span>\n            </div>\n            <div class=\"meta-row\">\n                <span class=\"meta-label\">INVOICE NO.</span>\n                <span class=\"meta-value\">{invoice_no}</span>\n            </div>\n            <div class=\"payment-terms\">\n                {payment_terms}\n            </div>\n        </div>\n    </div>\n\n    <!-- Bill To -->\n    <div class=\"bill-to-section\">\n        <span class=\"section-title\">BILL TO</span>\n        <div>{bill_to_name_dept}</div>\n        <div>{bill_to_client_company}</div>\n        <div>{bill_to_address}</div>\n        <div>{bill_to_phone}</div>\n    </div>\n\n    <!-- Main Table -->\n    <table class=\"invoice-table\">\n        <thead>\n            <tr>\n                <th data-label=\"description\" class=\"col-desc\">DESCRIPTION</th>\n                <th data-label=\"qty\" class=\"col-qty\">QTY</th>\n                <th data-label=\"unit_price\" class=\"col-price\">UNIT PRICE</th>\n                <th data-label=\"total\" class=\"col-total\">TOTAL</th>\n            </tr>\n        </thead>\n        <tbody>\n            <tr>\n                <td class=\"col-desc\"></td>\n                <td class=\"col-qty\">1</td>\n                <td class=\"col-price\">$ 5.00</td>\n                <td class=\"col-total\">$ 5.00</td>\n            </tr>\n            <tr class=\"row-stripe\">\n                <td class=\"col-desc\"></td>\n                <td class=\"col-qty\">1</td>\n                <td class=\"col-price\">$ 7.00</td>\n                <td class=\"col-total\">$ 7.00</td>\n            </tr>\n            <tr>\n                <td class=\"col-desc\"></td>\n                <td class=\"col-qty\">1</td>\n                <td class=\"col-price\">$ 6.00</td>\n                <td class=\"col-total\">$ 6.00</td>\n            </tr>\n            <tr class=\"row-stripe\">\n                <td class=\"col-desc\"></td>\n                <td class=\"col-qty\"></td>\n                <td class=\"col-price\"></td>\n                <td class=\"col-total\">$ -</td>\n            </tr>\n            <tr>\n                <td class=\"col-desc\"></td>\n                <td class=\"col-qty\"></td>\n                <td class=\"col-price\"></td>\n                <td class=\"col-total\">$ -</td>\n            </tr>\n            <tr class=\"row-stripe\">\n                <td class=\"col-desc\"></td>\n                <td class=\"col-qty\"></td>\n                <td class=\"col-price\"></td>\n                <td class=\"col-total\">$ -</td>\n            </tr>\n        </tbody>\n    </table>\n\n    <!-- Totals and Remarks -->\n    <div class=\"totals-container\">\n        <div class=\"remarks-box\">\n            <strong>Remarks / Payment Instructions:</strong> Payment due within Net 30 days. Late payments may incur a 2% monthly interest. Taxes applied as per local regulations.\n        </div>\n        <div class=\"totals-box\">\n            <div class=\"total-row\">\n                <span class=\"total-label\">SUBTOTAL</span>\n                <span class=\"total-value\">$ {total_subtotal}</span>\n            </div>\n            <div class=\"total-row\">\n                <span class=\"total-label\">DISCOUNT</span>\n                <span class=\"total-value\">$ {total_discount}</span>\n            </div>\n            <div class=\"total-row\">\n                <span class=\"total-label\">SUBTOTAL LESS DISCOUNT</span>\n                <span class=\"total-value\">$ {total_subtotal_less_discount}</span>\n            </div>\n            <div class=\"total-row\">\n                <span class=\"total-label\">TAX RATE</span>\n                <span class=\"total-value\">{total_tax_rate}</span>\n            </div>\n            <div class=\"total-row\">\n                <span class=\"total-label\">TOTAL TAX</span>\n                <span class=\"total-value\">$ {total_tax}</span>\n            </div>\n            <div class=\"total-row\">\n                <span class=\"total-label\">SHIPPING/HANDLING</span>\n                <span class=\"total-value\">$ {total_shipping}</span>\n            </div>\n            <div class=\"total-row balance-due\">\n                <span class=\"total-label\">BALANCE DUE</span>\n                <span class=\"total-value\">$ {total_balance_due}</span>\n            </div>\n        </div>\n    </div>\n\n    <!-- Footer Area -->\n    <div class=\"footer-area\">\n        <div class=\"payment-instructions\">\n            Make all checks payable to {payment_payable_to}. Or submit payment via Venmo: {venmo_account} or Paypal: {paypal_account}\n        </div>\n        <div class=\"signatures\">\n            <div>Company Signature X</div>\n            <div>Client Signature X</div>\n        </div>\n        <div style=\"display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: flex-end;\">\n            <div class=\"bottom-message\">Thank you for your business!</div>\n            <div class=\"footer-logo\">\n                <div>This invoice is brought to you by</div>\n                <div style=\"font-size: 20px; font-weight: bold; color: #333;\">\n                    <span style=\"color: #444;\">Online</span><span style=\"color: var(--primary-green);\">Invoices</span>\n                </div>\n            </div>\n        </div>\n    </div>\n\n    <div class=\"footer-bar\"></div>\n</div>\n\n</body>\n</html>\n<!--END_HTML-->\n<!--BEGIN_SCHEMA_JSON-->\n{\n  \"scalars\": [\n    \"company_name_placeholder\",\n    \"company_address\",\n    \"company_phone\",\n    \"company_email\",\n    \"invoice_date\",\n    \"invoice_no\",\n    \"payment_terms\",\n    \"bill_to_name_dept\",\n    \"bill_to_client_company\",\n    \"bill_to_address\",\n    \"bill_to_phone\",\n    \"payment_payable_to\",\n    \"venmo_account\",\n    \"paypal_account\"\n  ],\n  \"row_tokens\": [],\n  \"totals\": [\n    \"total_subtotal\",\n    \"total_discount\",\n    \"total_subtotal_less_discount\",\n    \"total_tax_rate\",\n    \"total_tax\",\n    \"total_shipping\",\n    \"total_balance_due\"\n  ],\n  \"notes\": \"Schema inferred from visual structure.       <div class=\"company-name\">{sender_name}</div>\n            <div class=\"company-address\">\n                {sender_address}\n            </div>\n        </div>\n        <div class=\"middle-section\">\n        <div class=\"bill-to-box\">\n            <div class=\"bill-to-label\">Bill To</div>\n            <div class=\"bill-to-address\">\n                {bill_to_name}<br>\n                {bill_to_address}\n            </div>\n        </div>\n        <div class=\"invoice-details-box\">\n            <div class=\"detail-row\">\n                <span class=\"detail-label\">Invoice Date :</span>\n                <span class=\"detail-value\">{invoice_date}</span>\n            </div>\n            <div class=\"detail-row\">\n                <span class=\"detail-label\">Terms :</span>\n                <span class=\"detail-value\">{terms}</span>\n            </div>\n            <div class=\"detail-row\">\n                <span class=\"detail-label\">Due Date :</span>\n                <span class=\"detail-value\">{due_date}</span>\n            </div>\n            <div class=\"detail-row\">\n                <span class=\"detail-label\">P.O.# :</span>\n                <span class=\"detail-value\">{po_number}</span>\n            </div>\n            <div class=\"detail-row\">\n                <span class=\"detail-label\">Project Name :</span>\n                <span class=\"detail-value\">{project_name}</span>\n            </div>\n        </div>\n    </div>\n\n    <!-- Main Table -->\n    <table id=\"data-table\">\n        <thead>\n            <tr>\n                <th data-label=\"num\">#</th>\n                <th data-label=\"item_description\">Item & Description</th>\n                <th data-label=\"qty\">Qty</th>\n                <th data-label=\"rate\">Rate</th>\n                <th data-label=\"discount\">Discount</th>\n                <th data-label=\"amount\">Amount</th>\n class=\"item-title\">Brochure Design</span>\n                    <span class=\"item-desc\">Brochure Design Single Sided Color</span>\n                </td>\n                <td>{row_qty}</td>\n                <td>{row_rate}</td>\n                <td>{row_discount}</td>\n                <td>{row_amount}</td>\n            </tr>\n            <!-- Row 2 -->\n            <tr>\n                <td>{row_num}</td>\n                <td>\n                    <span class=\"item-title\">Web Design Packages(Template) - Basic</span>\n                    <span class=\"item-desc\">Custom Themes for your business. Inclusive of 10 hours of marketing and annual training</span>\n                </td>\n                <td>{row_qty}</td>\n                <td>{row_rate}</td>\n                <td>{row_discount}</td>\n                <td>{row_amount}</td>\n            </tr>\n            <!-- Row 3 -->\n            <tr>\n                <td>{row_num}</td>\n                <td>\n                    <span class=\"item-title\">Print Ad - Basic - Color</span>\n                    <span class=\"item-desc\">Print Ad 1/8 size Color</span>\n                </td>\n                <td>{row_qty}</td>\n                <td>{row_rate}</td>\n                <td>{row_discount}</td>\n                <td>{row_amount}</td>\n            </tr>\n        </tbody>\n    </table>\n\n    <!-- Totals -->\n    <div class=\"totals-section\">\n        <table class=\"totals-table\">\n            <tr>\n                <td>Sub Total</td>\n                <td>{sub_total}</td>\n            </tr>\n            <tr>\n                <td>Sample Tax1 (4.70%)</td>\n                <td>{tax1}</td>\n            </tr>\n            <tr>\n                <td>Sample Tax2 (7.00%)</td>\n                <td>{tax2}</td>\n            </tr>\n            <tr class=\"total-row\">\n                <td>Total</td>\n                <td>{total}</td>\n            </tr>\n            <tr class=\"payment-row\">\n                <td>Payment Made</td>\n                <td>{payment_made}</td>\n            </tr>\n            <tr class=\"balance-row\">\n                <td>Balance Due</td>\n                <td>{balance_due_bottom}</td>\n            </tr>\n        </table>\n    </div>\n\n    <!-- Footer -->\n    <div class=\"footer-section\">\n        <div class=\"footer-row\">\n            <span class=\"footer-label\">Notes</span>\n            <div class=\"footer-content\">{notes_text}</div>\n        </div>\n        <div class=\"footer-row\">\n            <span class=\"footer-label\">Payment Options</span>\n            <div class=\"payment-options\">\n                <div class=\"paypal-logo\">PayPal</div>\n                <div style=\"background:#333; width:30px; height:18px; border-radius:2px;\"></div>\n {
  "id": "chatcmpl-bd4ea2e56c85ceb9",

    {
      "index": 0,
      "message": {
        "role": "assistant",
        "content": "{\n  \"overview_md\": \"# Invoice Report Mapping Contract\\n\\n## Executive Summary\\nThis contract defines the data mapping for a single-page invoice report (Invoice INV-17). The report aggregates header metadata, line item details, and financial totals from three source tables: `invoices`, `invoice_items`, and `payments`. The logic ensures that invoice headers, line items, and payment history are correctly joined and formatted for the HTML template.\\n\\n## Token Inventory\\n- **Scalars (Header & Totals)**: 13 tokens including invoice metadata (number, dates, PO), financial summaries (subtotal, taxes, grand total), and payment status (balance due, payment made).\\n- **Row Tokens**: 0 tokens defined in the schema (line items are handled via implicit row generation in the template, but the contract focuses on the scalar aggregation logic for this specific input).\\n- **Totals**: 0 explicit total tokens defined in the schema (financial values are treated as scalar aggregates).\\n\\n## Mapping Table\\n| Token | Source Column | Type | Notes |\\n| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |\\n| `invoice_number` | `invoices.invoice_number` | String | Primary key |\\n| `balance_due_top` | `invoices.total_amount` | Currency | Displayed as top-level balance |\\n| `invoice_date` | `invoices.issue_date` | Date | Formatted DD-MM-YYYY HH:MM:SS |\\n| `terms` | `invoices.notes` | String | Terms and conditions |\\n| `due_date` | `invoices.due_date` | Date | Formatted DD-MM-YYYY HH:MM:SS |\\n| `po_number` | `UNRESOLVED` | String | No direct mapping in catalog |\\n| `project_name` | `UNRESOLVED` | String | No direct mapping in catalog |\\n| `sub_total` | `invoices.subtotal` | Currency | Sum of line items |\\n| `tax_1` | `UNRESOLVED` | Currency | No specific tax column |\\n| `tax_2` | `UNRESOLVED` | Currency | No specific tax column |\\n| `grand_total` | `invoices.total_amount` | Currency | Final amount |\\n| `payment_made` | `payments.amount_paid` | Currency | Aggregated sum |\\n| `final_balance` | `invoices.total_amount` | Currency | Calculated difference |\\n\\n## Join & Date Rules\\n- **Join Strategy**: `invoices` is the parent table. `invoice_items` and `payments` are child tables joined on `invoice_number`.\\n- **Date Columns**: `invoices.issue_date` and `invoices.due_date` are formatted using `format_date`.\\n- **Filtering**: No mandatory filters defined, but `invoice_number` acts as the primary filter key.\\n\\n## Transformations\\n- **Date Formatting**: All date tokens are converted to `%d-%m-%Y %H:%M:%S`.\\n- **Numeric Formatting**: All currency tokens use `number(2)` or `currency(2)`.\\n- **Calculated Fields**: `final_balance` is computed as `grand_total` minus `payment_made`.\\n\\n## Parameters\\n- **Required**: None (Invoice is typically retrieved by ID/Number).\\n- **Optional**: `date_from`, `date_to` (for filtering by invoice date).\\n\",\n  \"step5_requirements\": {\n    \"datasets\": {\n      \"header\": {\n        \"description\": \"Invoice metadata and summary financials.\",\n        \"columns\": [\n          \"invoice_number\",\n          \"balance_due_top\",\n          \"invoice_date\",\n          \"terms\",\n          \"due_date\",\n          \"po_number\",\n          \"project_name\",\n          \"sub_total\",\n          \"tax_1\",\n          \"tax_2\",\n          \"grand_total\",\n          \"payment_made\",\n          \"final_balance\"\n        ]\n      },\n      \"rows\": {\n        \"description\": \"Line items for the invoice (handled implicitly by template loop).\",\n        \"columns\": [],\n        \"grouping\": [],\n        \"ordering\": []\n      },\n      \"totals\": {\n        \"description\": The report aggregates invoice header details (date, number, addresses) and line-item details (description, total) from the `invoices` and `invoice_items` tables, joined on the invoice number. It calculates and formats financial totals and ensures proper date formatting for the invoice issue date.\\n\\n## Token Inventory\\n- **Scalars (Header):** `invoice_date`, `invoice_no`, `bill_to`, `ship_to`, `remarks`, `total_amount`.\\n- **Rows (Line Items):** `row_description`, `row_total`.\\n- **Totals:** `total_amount` (reused as a scalar for the final display).\\n\\n## Mapping Table\\n| Token | Source Column | Type | Notes |\\n| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |\\n| `invoice_date` | `invoices.issue_date` | Date | Formatted via `row_computed` |\\n| `invoice_no` | `invoices.invoice_number` | String | Direct mapping |\\n| `bill_to` | `customers.billing_address` | String | Direct mapping |\\n| `ship_to` | `customers.billing_address` | String | Defaulted to billing address (no specific ship column in catalog) |\\n| `remarks` | `invoices.notes` | String | Direct mapping |\\n| `total_amount` | `invoices.total_amount` | Currency | Aggregated sum |\\n| `row_description` | `invoice_items.description` | String | Direct mapping |\\n| `row_total` | `invoice_items.line_total` | Currency | Direct mapping |\\n\\n## Join & Date Rules\\n- **Join Strategy:** The report joins `invoices` (parent) with `invoice_items` (child) on `invoice_number`.\\n- **Date Handling:** The `issue_date` column is explicitly formatted to `dd-mm-yyyy HH:MM:SS` using a declarative `format_date` operation. No SQL `strftime` is used.\\n\\n## Transformations\\n- **Date Formatting:** `invoices.issue_date` is transformed to a human-readable string.\\n- **Aggregation:** The `total_amount` is calculated as the sum of `row_total` (line items) for the specific invoice context.\\n- **No Reshape:** Data is presented in a standard row-by-row format; no melting or unioning is required.\\n\\n## Parameters\\n- **Required:** None (The contract assumes a specific invoice context is provided via the join key or a filter parameter `invoice_no` if dynamic).\\n- **Optional:** `invoice_no` (to filter a specific invoice).\\n\",\n  \"step5_requirements\": {\n    \"datasets\": {\n      \"header\": {\n        \"description\": \"Invoice metadata including date, number, addresses, and remarks.\",\n        \"columns\": [\"invoice_date\", \"invoice_no\", \"bill_to\", \"ship_to\", \"remarks\", \"total_amount\"]\n      },\n      \"rows\": {\n        \"description\": \"Line items detailing the description and total for each item on the invoice.\",\n        \"columns\": [\"row_description\", \"row_total\"],\n        \"grouping\": [\"invoice_no\"],\n        \"ordering\": [\"line_no\"]\n      },\n      \"totals\": {\n        \"description\": \"Aggregated financial totals for the invoice.\",\n        \"columns\": [\"total_amount\"]\n      }\n    },\n    \"semantics\": \"Scalars are pulled from the parent `invoices` table (and `customers` for addresses). formatting.\",\n      \"Sum `invoice_items.line_total` to derive the invoice `total_amount`.\",\n      \"Join `invoices` and `invoice_items` on `invoice_number`.\",\n      \"Join `invoices` and line-height: 1.8;\n        }\n\n        .info-col {\n            width: 48%;\n        }\n\n        .info-label {\n            font-weight: bold;\n            color: var(--label-color);\n            margin-right: 10px;\n            display: inline-block;\n            width: 50px;\n        }\n\n        .terms-section {\n            margin-top: 20px;\n            font-size: 14px;\n            line-height: 1.8;\n        }\n\n        /* Table */\n        .table-container {\n            width: 100%;\n            border-collapse: collapse;\n            margin-bottom: 20px;\n        }\n\n }\n\n        .table-container th {\n            background-color: #fff;\n            font-weight: bold;\n            color: #555;\n            text-align: center;\n            padding: 12px;\n        }\n\n        .col-desc { width: var(--col-desc-width); }\n        .col-qty { width: var(--col-qty-width); text-align: center; }\n        .col-price { width: var(--col-price-width); text-align: right; {\n            font-size: 24px;\n            color: #555;\n            border-bottom: none;\n            border-top: 1px solid var(--border-color);\n            padding-top: 15px;\n        }\n\n        .balance-row .totals-value {\n            font-size: 24px;\n            font-weight: bold;\n            border-bottom: none;\n            border-top: 1px solid var(--border-color);\n            padding-top: 15px;\n        }\n\n        /* Notes */\n        .notes-section {\n            margin-top: 50px;\n        }\n\n        .notes-title {\n            font-size: 32px;\n            color: font-size: 14px;\n            color: #000;\n        }\n\n        /* Footer Button */\n        .footer-btn {\n            display: inline-block;\n            background-color: var(--button-bg);\n
