class=\"meta-info\">\n                <div><span class=\"meta-label\">DATE:</span> {invoice_date}</div>\n                <div><span class=\"meta-label\">INVOICE</span> {invoice_number}</div>\n            </div>\n        </div>\n    </div>\n\n    <!-- From / To / Terms -->\n    <div class=\"info-section\">\n        <div class=\"info-col\">\n            <div><span class=\"info-label\">FROM:</span> {from_company_name}</div>\n            <div><span class=\"info-label\"></span> {from_email}</div>\n            <div><span class=\"info-label\"></span> {from_address_1}</div>\n            <div><span class=\"info-label\"></span> {from_address_2}</div>\n        </div>\n        <div class=\"info-col\">\n            <div><span class=\"info-label\">TO:</span> {to_client_name}</div>\n            <div><span class=\"info-label\"></span> {to_email}</div>\n            <div><span class=\"info-label\"></span> {to_address_1}</div>\n            <div><span class=\"info-label\"></span> {to_address_2}</div>\n        </div>\n    </div>\n\n    <div class=\"terms-section\">\n        <div><span class=\"info-label\">TERMS:</span> {terms}</div>\n        <div><span class=\"info-label\">DUE:</span> {due_date}</div>\n    </div>\n\n    <!-- Main Table -->\n    <table class=\"table-container\" id=\"data-table\">\n        <thead>\n            <tr>\n                <th class=\"col-desc\" data-label=\"item_description\">Item Description</th>\n                <th class=\"col-qty\" data-label=\"quantity\">Quantity</th>\n                <th class=\"col-price\" data-label=\"price\">Price</th>\n                <th class=\"col-amount\" data-label=\"amount\">Amount</th>\n            </tr>\n        </thead>\n        <tbody>\n            <tr>\n                <td class=\"col-desc\">{row_item_description}</td>\n                <td class=\"col-qty\">{row_quantity}</td>\n                <td class=\"col-price\">{row_price}</td>\n                <td  <tr>\n                <td class=\"totals-label\">Subtotal</td>\n                <td class=\"totals-value\">{total_subtotal}</td>\n            </tr>\n            <tr>\n                <td The pipeline joins `invoices` as the parent table with `invoice_items` as the child table to produce a flat row-based structure for line items, while scalar tokens pull from the parent `invoices` and `customers` tables.\\n\\n## Token Inventory\\n- **Scalars (Header/Footer):** 21 tokens covering company info, billing/ship-to addresses, invoice metadata, and summary totals.\\n- **Row Tokens (Line Items):** 5 tokens (`row_item_service`, `row_description`, `row_quantity_hrs`, `row_rate`, `row_amount`).\\n- **Totals Tokens:** 0 explicit tokens in schema (totals are handled via scalar mapping).\\n\\n## Mapping Logic\\n- **Join:** `invoices` (parent) \u2192 `invoice_items` (child) on `invoice_number`.\\n- **Scalars:** Mapped directly to `invoices` or `customers` columns. `invoice_date` and `due_date` are formatted via `row_computed`.\\n- **Row Tokens:** Mapped to `invoice_items` columns. `row_amount` is computed as `quantity * unit_price` to ensure accuracy, though `line_total` exists in the catalog.\\n- **Totals:** The scalar tokens `subtotal`, `sales_tax`, `shipping`, and `total` are mapped directly to `invoices.subtotal`, `invoices.tax_amount`, `invoices.discount_amount` (mapped to shipping as no direct shipping col exists, or assumed 0 if not present), and `invoices.total_amount`.\\n\\n## Transformations\\n- **Date Formatting:** `invoice_date` and `due_date` are formatted to `dd-mm-yyyy HH:MM:SS`.\\n- **Numeric Formatting:** All currency fields use `currency(2)` or `number(2)` formatting.\\n- **Computed Row:** `row_amount` is calculated as `row_quantity_hrs * row_rate`.\\n\\n## Parameters\\n- **Required:** None (all data is derived from the joined dataset).\\n- **Optional:** `date_from`, `date_to` for filtering invoices by issue date.\\n\\n## Validation\\n- All schema tokens are resolved.\\n- No SQL expressions are used; ## 2026-04-30T14:21:36+00:00Z - v3_df

```json
{
  "id": "chatcmpl-a9c30ae262e410e8",
  "model": "Qwen/Qwen3.5-27B-FP8",
  "choices": [
    {
      "index": 0,
      "message": {
        "role": "assistant",
        "content": "{\n  \"overview_md\": \"# Batch Weighing Report Contract\\n\\n## Executive Summary\\nThis contract defines the data mapping and transformation logic for a Batch Weighing Report. The report aggregates recipe data from the `recipes` table, specifically focusing on 12 bins per batch. It calculates the difference between set weights and actual weights (error) and the percentage error for each bin. The report is structured to display batch-level headers (ID, Start/End time) followed by a detailed table of materials (bins) and their weighing metrics.\\n\\n## Token Inventory\\n- **Scalars (Header):** `plant_name`, `location`, `print_date`, `from_date`, `to_date`, `batch_no`, `report_title`.\\n- **Row Tokens (Table Rows):** `row_sl_no` (Sequence), `row_material_name` (Bin Content), `row_set_wt_kg` (Set Weight), `row_ach_wt_kg` (Actual Weight), `row_error_kg` (Calculated Error), `row_error_pct` (Calculated % Error).\\n- **Totals:** `total_set_wt_kg`, `total_ach_wt_kg`, `total_error_kg`, `total_error_pct`.\\n\\n## Mapping Table\\n| Token | Source | Type |\\n| :--- | :--- | :--- |\\n| `batch_id` | `recipes:id` | Direct |\\n| `batch_start` | `recipes:start_time` | Direct (Formatted) |\\n| `batch_end` | `recipes:end_time` | Direct (Formatted) |\\n| `batch_no` | `recipes:recipe_name` | Direct |\\n| `row_material_name` | `MELT` (bin1_content...bin12_content) | Reshape |\\n| `row_set_wt_kg` | `MELT` (bin1_sp...bin12_sp) | Reshape |\\n| `row_ach_wt_kg` | `MELT` (bin1_act...bin12_act) | Reshape |\\n| `row_error_kg` | `COMPUTED` (Actual - Set) | Computed |\\n| `row_error_pct` | `COMPUTED` ((Actual - Set) / Set * 100) | Computed |\\n| `row_sl_no` | `COMPUTED` (Row Number) | Computed |\\n\\n## Join & Date Rules\\n- **Join Strategy:** Self-join or single-table operation on `recipes`. Parent and Child are both `recipes` keyed by `id`.\\n- **Date Columns:** `recipes:start_time` and `recipes:end_time` are used for filtering and display.\\n- **Filters:** `date_from` and `date_to` map to `recipes:start_time` and `recipes:end_time` respectively.\\n\\n## Transformations\\n1. **Reshape (Melt):** The 12 bin columns for content, set weight, and actual weight are unpivoted into three distinct columns (`row_material_name`, `row_set_wt_kg`, `row_ach_wt_kg`).\\n2. **Row Computation:**\\n   - `row_error_kg`: Subtract `row_set_wt_kg` from `row_ach_wt_kg`.\\n   - `row_error_pct`: Divide the difference by `row_set_wt_kg`, multiply by 100, and round to 2 decimals.\\n   - `row_sl_no`: Generate a sequential integer (1, 2, 3...).\\n3. **Totals Computation:** Sum the row-level values for set, actual, and error weights. Calculate total error percentage as the ratio of total error to total set weight.\\n\\n## Parameters\\n- **Required:** None (Report uses internal data).\\n- **Optional:** `date_from` (Start time filter), `date_to` (End time filter).\\n\",\n  \"step5_requirements\": {\n    \"datasets\": {\n      \"header\": {\n        \"description\": \"Report metadata and batch identification details.\",\n        \"columns\": [\n          \"plant_name\",\n          \"location\",\n          \"print_date\",\n          \"from_date\",\n          \"to_date\",\n          \"batch_no\",\n          \"report_title\"\n        ]\n      },\n      \"rows\": {\n        \"description\": \"Detailed weighing records for each bin within a batch.\",\n        \"columns\": [\n          \"row_sl_no\",\n          \"row_material_name\",\n          \"row_set_wt_kg\",\n          \"row_ach_wt_kg\",\n          \"row_error_kg\",\n          \"row_error_pct\"\n        ],\n        \"grouping\": [\n          \"batch_id\",\n          \"batch_start\",\n          \"batch_end\"\n        ],\n        \"ordering\": [\n          \"row_sl_no ASC\"\n        ]\n      },\n      \"totals\": {\n        \"description\": \"Aggregated totals for the batch.\",\n        \"columns\": [\n          \"total_set_wt_kg\",\n          \"total_ach_wt_kg\",\n          \"total_error_kg\",\n          \"total_error_pct\"\n        ]\n      }\n    },\n    \"semantics\": \"The report filters batches based on the provided date range. The `batch_id` acts as the primary grouping key. Within each batch, the 12 bins are expanded into individual rows. Calculations are performed row-by-row for error metrics and aggregated for the footer totals.\",\n    \"parameters\": {\n      \"required\": [],\n      \"optional\": [\n        {\n          \"name\": \"date_from\",\n          \"type\": \"date\"\n        },\n        {\n          \"name\": \"date_to\",\n          \"type\": \"date\"\n        }\n      ]\n    },\n    \"transformations\": [\n      \"Melt the 12 bin columns (content, set_weight, actual_weight) into a single row per bin.\",\n      \"Calculate row-level error (Actual - Set) and percentage error.\",\n      \"Assign sequential row
```
